name: liquid-lab-logo-bar
description: Logo bar / 'trusted by' band with two layouts: a CSS-only infinite marquee (configurable direction, speed, hover-pause, mask-image edge fade) and a static responsive grid (1–4 cols mobile, 2–8 cols desktop). Logos render with a default grayscale + reduced-opacity treatment that lifts to full color/opacity on hover (or the inverse, for the Bold preset). Per-block height and opacity overrides via inline CSS variables, optional click-through URL with full focus-visible ring and 44×44 touch target. Theme Editor design-mode automatically halves the marquee speed so editing is smoother. prefers-reduced-motion stops the marquee, drops to flex-wrap, and collapses every entrance animation. Three presets — Dark (tech/premium, uppercase tracking, deep-navy bg), Warm (skincare/wellness, light serif weight, sand bg), Bold (fashion/lifestyle, full-color logos with reverse hover, hairline borders top + bottom). 24-block hard cap, smooth-loop guard renders the track 4× when block count < 4. Section-scoped @keyframes (`lab_logo_marquee_{section.id}`) so multiple instances on one page never collide.
